# OSS Labs

> A community of open source engineers building developer tools together.

## Overview

Founded as Open Vanguard, OSS Labs operates under ossl.dev. The GitHub organization is github.com/ossl-dev.

## Mission

We build open source tools that solve real problems. Each project exists because someone needed it badly enough to build it.

## How We Work

1. **Solve real problems.** We do not chase trends or rewrite things because a new framework dropped.
2. **Small is a feature.** Libraries that do one thing well over frameworks that do everything adequately.
3. **Review is where the work happens.** Patient, thorough code review produces better software.
4. **Earn the keys.** Write code, review PRs, help with issues. Consistent quality work earns commit access.

## Projects

- [genesis](https://github.com/ossl-dev/genesis): Declarative, cross-platform developer environment provisioning engine. TypeScript.
- [zinc](https://zinc.ossl.dev): Universal Shared Memory. High-performance shared memory library in Rust with bindings for C, Python, Node, and Go.
- [pylon](https://github.com/ossl-dev/pylon): Dead simple API versioning. Works with Express, Fastify, Hono, and anything middleware-shaped. TypeScript.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** SvelteKit (fully static generation)
- **Package manager:** Bun
- **Hosting:** Vercel
- **Domain:** ossl.dev

## Community

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ossl-dev)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/ossl-dev/discussions)

## Optional

- [llms.txt](https://ossl.dev/llms.txt): Short version of this file with essential links only.
- [Sitemap](https://ossl.dev/sitemap.xml): Full site structure for crawling.
